description: Refine REQ-029 (Agent-first web application redesign). Focus on: 1) Tighten acceptance criteria to be testable and specific. 2) Validate the 6-page structure (Agent Chat, Task Board, Workflow Monitor, Planning Hub, Dashboard, Settings) against current API capabilities — identify gaps. 3) Detail the Agent Chat page interaction model: how messages reach agents via IPC, how output streams back via SSE/WebSocket, reconnection behavior, session persistence. 4) Define data contracts needed for agent chat (what WebSocket messages look like, what events are streamed). 5) Ensure the requirement is implementable incrementally — define MVP vs full vision. The requirement file is at .ao/requirements/generated/REQ-029.json.
title: Refine REQ-029 web app requirement — agent-first page structure and acceptance criteria
